name: Crab and Portabella Melt
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Crab meat - jumbo or blackfin
1/4 teaspoon Old Bay seasoning (up to 1/2 teaspoon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill mushroom caps over an open flame, turning often until tender.
2. Place the caps on an oiled sheet pan and set aside.
3. In a bowl, combine mayonnaise, diced green pepper, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce (up to 8 drops), and Old Bay seasoning (up to 1/2 teaspoon). Mix well.
4. Drain the crab meat well and add it to the mixture. Toss lightly and incorporate thoroughly.
5. Top each mushroom cap with a slice of tomato and about 4-5 ounces of the crab mix.
6. Place the assembled caps in an oven preheated to 450 degrees Fahrenheit until warmed through completely.
7. Remove from the oven, top with cheese, and return to the oven until the cheese melts.
